snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii) 
Director & Editor-Gaurav Bista   
DOP-Newjal Shrestha  Nhuja Shakya  
Production Manager-Shyam Khadka   
Choreographer-Kritika Baral   
Creative Director-Risheek Pradhan  
Assistant Director-Animesh Deep Shankar   
Casting Director-Rajeev Thapa  
Drone & FPV Pilot-Akash Regmi  
Editor-Gaurav Bista   
Coloring-NFTP  
PD/Art Director-Ghanashyam Shrestha  
Asst.Art-Gyanendra Tamang, Mohan Tamang, Shreeniwash Chaudhary,  Nitesh Gupta   
Asst. production-Anup Khadka, Mahesh GM  
Head Gaffer-Ganesh singh Thakuri  
Lights-Photon films and lights   
Camera rental-KathaChitra  
AC-Ganesh & Niraj Chettri  
Light Man-Madhu Khati(Dhrum), Chaudhary Dai And Team
Crane-LightBenders  
Crane Operators-Prashant Yogi, Bijaya Ramtel(Kale)
Crane Taker-Prakash Shudras
Crane Intern-Shantosh Pariyar   
BTS-XYZ   
Costume Designer-Sujan Ratna Pariyar   
Stylist-Sushmita Rijal (suzustyles)  
Costumes By-Veshbhusa Design studio
Sponsors-OV Education, Riva Natural Spring water  

Cast-PREMA LAMGADE, LIL JHOLA, YOGESHBEATS, LIL LHAKEY, Sujal Bhagat, Rajeev Thapa, XuZeyu Lama, Pramod Panta, Anjan Dhakal, 

Dancers-Lakpa Lama, Prithivu Bhujel, Jivan Lama, Suraj Biru, Aman, Alvish Lama, Dinesh, Jivan tamang  

Special Thanks-Shayuj Pokhrel, Abiskar Gautam, Nj Shakya  

Beat produced by Yogeshbeats
https://www.instagram.com/yogeshbeats/

Mix/Master by 4z
https://www.instagram.com/4zboi/

#jamesy #selfmade #nachana

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Sushant KC - Ji Chanta Matina (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Ji Chanta Matina invites you to stop hiding your feelings and let your heart speak. We bring you a playful confession of love. 

Written/Produced/Mixed by Sushant KC
Produced by Uff KC
Mixed/Mastered by Foeseal

snippet.title: WAR MACHINE | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
During the final stage of U.S. Army Ranger selection, an elite team’s training exercise turns into a fight for survival against an unimaginable threat. Watch Alan Ritchson in War Machine on March 6th.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81768525

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

WAR MACHINE | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

snippet.title: DAKSHIN BHARTIYA BAHU OFFICIAL TRAILER I दक्षिण भारतीय बहू I ANJANA SINGH I NEW BHOJPURI MOVIE 2026
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #rakeshbabu #amitshukla #vidhyasingh #dakshinbhartiyabahu #trailer #bhojpurimovie #b4ubhojpuri #bhojpuri #upcomingbhojpurifilm #alpenliebe 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH ACTUAL MOVIES LLP 

SWEETNESS PARTNER - ALPENLIEBE

फ़िल्म – दक्षिण भारतीय बहू (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , राकेश  बाबू  ,अमित  शुक्ला ,विद्या  सिंह  , प्रेम  दुबे  , अनु  ओझा , प्रकाश  जैस , राम बाबू  कंचेर्ल  , जया  नायडू  , जया  राव 
बाल कलाकार  – स्वास्तिका
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह 
निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुडूरी
कथा - अरविन्द तिवारी
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी ,  
संकलन -  प्रीतम नाइक
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - आई फोकस स्टूडियो
सहायक निर्देशक   – रवि  तिवारी  , मेजर  खान
छायांकन- माही शेरला
कोरियोग्राफर - प्रवीण शेलार
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - अवदेश राय
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, अविनाश रोहरा
म्यूजिक – IVY ENTERTAINMENT

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

localized.description:

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

snippet.title: Shivansh Chapter 1 - Movie Trailer | Prabin Khatiwada, Tej Giri, Bikash, Rusha, Bimala, Kailash Kher
snippet.description:
Movie Trailer
SHIVANSH - Chapter 1

Synopsis: During the churning of the cosmic ocean ( samundra manthan) by gods and demons for the nectar of immortality, 
a deadly poison named halahala emerged first. To save world, lord shiva, the protector of universe, gathered the poison in his palms and drank it. 
In the process, the part of Mandara Parvat, the divine rock falls to ocean. After million of years, the astrologist found that divine rock in kaliyuga; 
a real threat or boon to the world is now the real question.

Director: Santosh Kumar Atreya
Story | Producer: Anjan KC
Screenplay: Barat Limboo
Script Doctor: Sulakshyan Bharati
Producer: Shova Bhandari
Executive Producer: ParichChhed Sen, Sambhu Thapa
Co Producer: krishna Bogati, Anisha kc Bogati, Sunita Rana, Nirmal m. Bhandari
Line Producer: Milan Bikram Shah, Dipika Singh Thakuri

Cast: Prabin Khatiwada, Tej Giri, Bikash Joshi, Rusha Neupane, Bimala Limbu, Udaya Kumar Subba, Santosh Kumar Atreya, Barat Limboo, Pradip Kumar Chaudhary, Sabeer Churaute, Tika Niraula, Kundan chaudhary, Ratna lingtel

Voiceover Artist: Sher Bahadur Nepal (Actor Boy)
Playback Singer: kailash kher
Singer: Rajan Raj Shiwakoti, Milan Newar, Samikshya Adhikari, Priya Nair, Karan Pariyar, Banika Pradhan   
Music Director: Nhyoo Bajracharya, Rajan Raj Shiwakoti, Yug bhusal
Lyricist: Viplob Pratik, Rajan Raj Shiwakoti
Choreographer: Bikram Chauhan   
Costume: Kamal Mishra
MUA: Tulasa Limbu
Production Manager: Milan Manandhar, Ram Bastola 
Media co-ordinator: Paban Bhattarai, Surakshya Bhattarai
Publicity Design: Rakesh Dahal
Gaffer: Mukesh Tamrakar
Pilot Sound: Sagar Ghimire
Assistant Cinematographer | Focus Puller: Rajendra Pal
Art Director: Pratik Chaudhary
Casting Director: Kundan Chaudhari, Pariwartan, Ram bastola
Action Director: Milan Shrestha
Chief AD: Barat limboo
First AD: Kundan Chaudhari
Asst. Directors: Sudip Nepal, Suyog Atreya
VFX Supervisors: Satyam Rana | Samir Miya 
CGI | Animation: JAZZ Production
Film Mastering: Nabin Chaudhari 
5.1 Mixing: Mukesh Shah
Editor: Banish Shah
Trailer: Milan Bikram Shah
Assist editor | Visual Graphic Design: Milan Bikram Shah
BGM: Kalacharan
Colorist: Rajendra Moktan
DOP: Sharad Mahato 
Post Production: Chalachitra Chautari
Distributor: Digital Cinema Nepal [DCN]


Special Thanks: Khyam Narayan Lamsal, Dr. Dhruba lamsal, Devi lamsal, Kushal Sharma, Kumar Gurung, Dhana Kaji Shrestha, Ramesh Timalsina, Pragati English Boarding School, Toda Mart, Nawa Adarsha Club, Bindhya Vasini Secondary School

en.title: Shivansh Chapter 1 - Movie Trailer | Prabin Khatiwada, Tej Giri, Bikash, Rusha, Bimala, Kailash Kher
en.description:
Movie Trailer
SHIVANSH - Chapter 1

Synopsis: During the churning of the cosmic ocean ( samundra manthan) by gods and demons for the nectar of immortality, 
a deadly poison named halahala emerged first. To save world, lord shiva, the protector of universe, gathered the poison in his palms and drank it. 
In the process, the part of Mandara Parvat, the divine rock falls to ocean. After million of years, the astrologist found that divine rock in kaliyuga; 
a real threat or boon to the world is now the real question.

snippet.title: Michael (2026) Official Trailer - Jaafar Jackson
snippet.description:
MICHAEL – in theaters & IMAX April 24, 2026. Starring Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, Juliano Krue Valdi, with Miles Teller, and Colman Domingo.

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

fr-FR.title: Michael (2026) Bande-annonce officielle - Jaafar Jackson
fr-FR.description:
MICHAEL – Au cinéma et en IMAX le 24 avril 2026. Avec Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, Juliano Krue Valdi, Miles Teller et Colman Domingo.

Abonnez-vous à la chaîne YouTube de LIONSGATE pour découvrir les dernières bandes-annonces, extraits et bien plus encore : https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL est le portrait cinématographique de la vie et de l’héritage de l’un des artistes les plus influents que le monde ait jamais connus. Ce film raconte la vie de Michael Jackson au-delà de la musique, retraçant son parcours depuis la découverte de son talent exceptionnel en tant que leader des Jackson Five, jusqu'à l'artiste visionnaire dont l'ambition créative l'a poussé à une quête incessante pour devenir la plus grande star du monde. Mettant en lumière sa vie privée et certaines des performances les plus emblématiques de ses débuts en solo, le film offre aux spectateurs une place de choix pour découvrir Michael Jackson comme jamais auparavant. C'est ici que son histoire commence.

hi.title: माइकल (2026) आधिकारिक ट्रेलर - जाफ़र जैक्सन
hi.description:
माइकल – सिनेमाघरों और आईमैक्स में 24 अप्रैल, 2026 को। इसमें जाफ़र जैक्सन, निया लॉन्ग, लौरा हैरियर, जुलियानो क्रू वाल्डी, माइल्स टेलर और कोलमैन डोमिंगो मुख्य भूमिका में हैं।

नवीनतम मूवी ट्रेलर, क्लिप और अन्य अपडेट के लिए लायंसगेट यूट्यूब चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

माइकल विश्व के सबसे प्रभावशाली कलाकारों में से एक के जीवन और विरासत का सिनेमाई चित्रण है। यह फिल्म माइकल जैक्सन के संगीत से परे के जीवन की कहानी बयां करती है, जिसमें जैक्सन फाइव के प्रमुख के रूप में उनकी असाधारण प्रतिभा की खोज से लेकर एक दूरदर्शी कलाकार बनने तक की उनकी यात्रा को दर्शाया गया है, जिनकी रचनात्मक महत्वाकांक्षा ने उन्हें दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा मनोरंजनकर्ता बनने के लिए अथक प्रयास करने को प्रेरित किया। उनके मंच से इतर जीवन और उनके शुरुआती एकल करियर के कुछ सबसे यादगार प्रदर्शनों को उजागर करते हुए, यह फिल्म दर्शकों को माइकल जैक्सन को पहले कभी न देखे गए अंदाज में करीब से देखने का मौका देती है। यहीं से उनकी कहानी शुरू होती है।

de-DE.title: Michael (2026) Offizieller Trailer – Jaafar Jackson
de-DE.description:
MICHAEL – Ab 24. April 2026 im Kino & IMAX. Mit Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Laura Harrier, Juliano Krue Valdi, Miles Teller und Colman Domingo.

Abonniere den LIONSGATE YouTube-Kanal für die neuesten Filmtrailer, Clips und mehr: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL ist die filmische Darstellung des Lebens und Vermächtnisses eines der einflussreichsten Künstler aller Zeiten. Der Film erzählt die Geschichte von Michael Jacksons Leben abseits der Musik und zeichnet seinen Weg von der Entdeckung seines außergewöhnlichen Talents als Frontmann der Jackson Five bis hin zum visionären Künstler nach, dessen kreativer Ehrgeiz ihn unermüdlich dazu antrieb, der größte Entertainer der Welt zu werden. Der Film beleuchtet sowohl sein Leben abseits der Bühne als auch einige der legendärsten Auftritte seiner frühen Solokarriere und bietet dem Publikum einen unvergleichlichen Einblick in Michael Jacksons Leben. Hier beginnt seine Geschichte.

pt-BR.title: Michael (2026) Trailer Oficial - Jaafar Jackson

https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL é a representação cinematográfica da vida e do legado de um dos artistas mais influentes que o mundo já conheceu. O filme conta a história da vida de Michael Jackson além da música, traçando sua trajetória desde a descoberta de seu talento extraordinário como líder dos Jackson Five até se tornar o artista visionário cuja ambição criativa alimentou uma busca incansável para se tornar o maior artista do mundo. Destacando tanto sua vida fora dos palcos quanto algumas das performances mais icônicas do início de sua carreira solo, o filme oferece ao público um lugar na primeira fila para ver Michael Jackson como nunca antes. É aqui que sua história começa.

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL è il ritratto cinematografico della vita e dell'eredità di uno degli artisti più influenti che il mondo abbia mai conosciuto. Il film racconta la storia della vita di Michael Jackson oltre la musica, ripercorrendo il suo percorso dalla scoperta del suo straordinario talento come leader dei Jackson Five, all'artista visionario la cui ambizione creativa ha alimentato un'instancabile ricerca per diventare il più grande artista del mondo. Mettendo in risalto sia la sua vita fuori dal palco che alcune delle performance più iconiche dei suoi primi anni di carriera da solista, il film offre al pubblico un posto in prima fila per Michael Jackson come mai prima d'ora. È qui che inizia la sua storia.

id.title: Michael (2026) Official Trailer - Jaafar Jackson

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL adalah penggambaran sinematik tentang kehidupan dan warisan salah satu seniman paling berpengaruh yang pernah dikenal dunia. Film ini mengisahkan kehidupan Michael Jackson di luar musik, menelusuri perjalanannya dari penemuan bakat luar biasanya sebagai vokalis utama Jackson Five, hingga menjadi seniman visioner yang ambisi kreatifnya mendorong pengejaran tanpa henti untuk menjadi penghibur terbesar di dunia. Menyoroti kehidupannya di luar panggung dan beberapa penampilan paling ikonik dari awal karier solonya, film ini memberi penonton kesempatan untuk menyaksikan Michael Jackson dari dekat seperti belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya. Di sinilah kisahnya dimulai.

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
✎ Lyricist: Kumarbmzn 
♪ Music Composer: Bishwo Dong 
🎙 Singer: Bishwo Dong and Shanti Shree Pariyar
🎸 Music Arranger: Bishwo Dong
🎛️ Mixing Master: Dipesh Pradhan
🎧 Rec.: Dong Studio 

🎬 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
🎭 Artist: Rasmila Tamang | Ashish Manandhar 
🎞 Production Manager: Milan Katwal
🧥Wardrobe : Valentino The Boutique 
💅🏻 MUA: Sarita Prajapati
🎥 Cinematographer: Nabaraj Uprety
𓀤𓀥 Viral Step By: Ashish Manandhar
✂ Edit | Color | GFX: Manoj Karki
📽 Choreography | Direction: Mausam Himali 
🖼️ Post Production: Luminous Postwork

The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:

snippet.description:
🎧 Ed Sheeran - Shape of You (Lyrics)
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

Ed Sheeran:

https://www.facebook.com/EdSheeranMusic

Lyrics: Shape of You - Ed Sheeran

The club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (mmmm)
Me and my friends at the table doing shots
Drinking fast and then we talk slow (mmmm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me I'll give it a chance now (mmmm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van The Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance
And now I'm singing like
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, boy, let's not talk too much
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead (mmmm)
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is falling too
I'm in love with your body
Last night you were in my room
And now my bedsheets smell like you
Every day discovering something brand new
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Every day discovering something brand new
I'm in love with the shape of you
One week in we let the story begin
We're going out on our first date (mmmm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all you can eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (mmmm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doing okay (mmmm)
And leave and get in a taxi, then kiss in the backseat

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Mana Ko Haal [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Mana Ko Haal is a heartfelt portrayal of love, vulnerability, and the unspoken emotions that live quietly within us. Through raw melodies and sincere lyrics, we have tried to capture the fragile state of a heart caught between longing, hope, and truth. The visuals mirror this emotional journey, bringing to life moments of connection, distance, and reflection that many hearts will recognize as their own. 

Follow Ekdev:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ekdev.limbu/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EkdevLimbuThegim/

Listen to "Mana Ko Haal" now: https://ffm.to/manakohaal

Credits
Vocal, Composition & Lyrics: Ekdev Limbu
Cast: Mahek Shrestha

Audio Credits : 
Music Producer: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics Studio)
Mix and Master : Saswot Shrestha
Additional Composition / Lyrics: Dechen Phinasa, Salin Magar (Hook Studio)
Guitar: Bishal Chhetri, Bibek Rai
Drums: Neepesh Pariyar
Keys: Santosh Tamang

Video Credits : 
Directed by: Abhi Sampang Rai and Pragya Rai 
DOP: Ashesh Limbu, Prabin Mahato, Yogesh Rai (Chronicle Films)
Edit/Color: Bikesh Magar
Style/ MUA: Pragya Rai , Samasti Rai

Media Partner: Routine Of Nepali Music
Artist Manager: Bhaba Shrestha
Digital Manager: Ashim KC
For Business/Licensing inquiries: ekdevlimbu@gmail.com

▶︎ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1jJGnkMQFNsCoDimuhJgIf

snippet.title: Maatrubhumi | Battle Of Galwan | Salman Khan, Chitrangada | Apoorva Lakhia | Himesh, Arijit, Shreya

#SalmanKhan #BattleOfGalwan

Lyrics:-
             मुखड़ा-
कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
आरे सासे के गाथता हो सासे के गाथता 
को०- सासे के गाथता हो सासे के गाथता
आरे जाहवा ना नाथे के उहवा नाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता 
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2
             अंतरा - 01
होली में अपना सागा बेटी के धोखा देके   
को०- बेटी के धोखा देके बेटी के धोखा देके
भाग गईल बिया राड़ी दमदे के लेके 
को०- दमदे के लेके हो दमदे के लेके 
होली में अपना सागा बेटी के धोखा देके   
भाग गईल बिया राड़ी दमदे के लेके
सासे के लहंगा में दमी काछता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2
               अंतरा - 02
हाय रे इ कलयुग कहवा ले जाई 
को०- कहवा ले जाई हो कहवा ले जाई
बेटी के खाना अब माईये रोज खाई 
को०- माई रोज खाई हो माई रोज खाई 
हाय रे इ कलयुग कहवा ले जाई 
बेटी के खाना अब माईये  रोज खाई 
ससुई के हो रोज खेतवा पाटता हो
दामदा सासे के गाथता
को०- कलयुग में रिश्ता चिपरी पाथता हो 
दामदा सासे के गाथता - 2

Lyrics for "Justin Bieber - What Do You Mean"

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean?
Better make up your mind, what do you mean?

[Verse 1]
You’re so indecisive of what I'm sayin'
Tryna catch the beat, make up your heart
Don't know if you're happy or complainin'
Don't want for us to end, where do I start?

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right (Right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then you’re down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

[Verse 2]
You’re overprotective when I'm leavin'
Tryna compromise, but I can’t win
You wanna make a point, but you keep preachin'
You had me from the start, won't let this end

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right
(Turn right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then you’re down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh (Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (Oh, what do you mean?) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (I wanna know, ooh)
Oh, what do you mean? (Ooh)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Oh, baby)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean? (Don't be so selfish, baby, yeah, yeah) Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (You're so confusin', baby) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move (Hey), but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (Be more straightforward)
Oh, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
☀️Radio Paradise☀️

Subscribe and stay connected to what’s playing today.

📱Ed Sheeran - Perfect:
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/0tgVpDi06FyKpA1z0VMD4v
https://youtu.be/cNGjD0VG4R8?si=T4A45O-LthAe-X2_

LYRIC
I found a love for me
Darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
I never knew you were the someone waiting for me

'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
Not knowing what it was
I will not give you up this time
Darling, just kiss me slow
Your heart is all I own
And in your eyes, you're holding mine

Baby I'm, dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When you said you looked a mess
I whispered underneath my breath
But you heard it
Darling, you look perfect tonight

I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
She shares my dreams, I hope that someday I'll share her home
I found a lover to carry more than just my secrets
To carry love, to carry children of our own

We are still kids, but we're so in love
Fighting against all odds
I know we'll be alright this time
Darling, just hold my hand
Be my girl, I'll be your man
I see my future in your eyes

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When I saw you in that dress
Looking so beautiful
I don't deserve this
Darling, you look perfect tonight

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
I have faith in what I see
Now I know I have met an angel in person
And she looks perfect
I don't deserve this
You look perfect tonight

#EdSheeran #Perfect #Lyrics

snippet.description:

Badri Sapkota Presents: New Nepali Song 2082

|| Manung Kotaima ||

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

snippet.title: Qubool (Full Video) | Haq | Vishal Mishra | Armaan Khan | Yami Gautam & Emraan Hashmi | Hindi Song
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song “Qubool” from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track you’ll want to put on repeat.

#Qubool #HAqSongs #LoveSong #RomanticSong #NewSong #TrendingSong #YamiGautam #EmraanHashmi #VishalMishra #ArmaanKhan #QuboolHai #NewTrendingSong  #DekhoZaraDekhoNaamTeraLikhaHai

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Like || Share || Spread || Love

https://youtube.com/@timesmusicindia

Cast- Yami Gautam, Emraan Hashmi, Vartika Singh, Danish Husain, Sheeba Chadha, Aseem Hattangady
Directed by- Suparn S Varma
Produced by- Vineet Jain
Produced by- Vishal Gurnani, Juhi Parekh Mehta, Harman Baweja
Co-Produced by- Amrita Pandey, Suparn S Varma, Rowena Baweja, Sandeep Singh
Written by- Reshu Nath | Music by - Vishal Mishra

Song Credits 
Composer : Vishal Mishra
Lyrics : Kaushal Kishore
Singer : Armaan Khan 
Arrangement & Production : Vishal Mishra
Music Production by : Gaurav Vaswani
Additional Production : Kandarpa Kalita, Bitupon Boruah
Additional Vocals - Vishal Mishra 
Music Assistant : Kumar Gaurav Singh, Trihangku Lahkar, Bitupon Boruah
Mixed & Mastered by : Trihangku Lahkar @VMS

Bass : Aalaap Raju
Strokes : Tapas Roy
Acoustic Guitar : Kandarpa Kalita
Live Rhythm Arranged by : Prashant Sonagra & Swaranjay Dhumal
Tabla : Prashant Sonagra
Dholak : Mushtak Khan & Ishteyak Khan
Percussions : Swaranjay Dhumal, Prashant Sonagra, Harsh Bhoir & Mohit Kathak

Live Rhythms, Strokes Recorded at YRF Studio by : Vijay Dayal, Sagar Sathe
Guitars, Vocals Recorded at VMS by : Trihangku Lahkar & Bitupon Boruah

Lyrics Of Song ‘Qubool’
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

snippet.title: ROBLOX SURVIVE LAVA FOR BRAINROTS!
snippet.description:
Today I survived lava for brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song
snippet.description:
Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali 


Lyrics 

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu 

[Maya Yo Sadhai Bhari 
Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

Lyrics:
Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

snippet.title: ॐ जय जगदीश हरे आरती | Om Jai Jagdish Hare Aarti I Vishnu Ki Aarti : Aarti Song I Vishnu Aarti 2026
snippet.description:
#om_jai_jagdish_hare #vishnuArti #vishnuDhun
#om_jai_jagdish_hare #vishnuArti #vishnuDhun
#om_jai_jagdish_hare #vishnuArti #vishnudhun 

ॐ जय जगदीश हरे आरती | Om Jai Jagdish Hare Aarti I Vishnu Ki Aarti : Aarti Song I Vishnu Aarti 2026
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे आरती | Om Jai Jagdish Hare Aarti I Vishnu Ki Aarti : Aarti Song I Vishnu Aarti 2026

Vishnu Ki Aarti,ॐ जय जगदीश हरे आरती,Om Jai Jagdish Hare Aarti,Aarti Song,om jai jagdish hare aarti,aarti om jai jagdish hare,om jai jagdish hare aarti fast,om jai jagdish hare aarti live,om jai jagdish hare aarti hindi,om jai jagdish hare aarti lyrics,om jai jagdish hare aarti lakkha,om jai jagdish hare full aarti,om jai jagdish hare aarti new song,om jai jagdish hare aarti mail voice,om jai jagdish hare aarti new version,Vishnu Aarti,जगदीश हरे आरती

#om_jai_jagdish_hare #vishnuArti#vishnuDhun#Brahspatiwar
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे,
स्वामी जय जगदीश हरे ।
भक्त जनों के संकट,
दास जनों के संकट,
क्षण में दूर करे ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

जो ध्यावे फल पावे,
दुःख बिनसे मन का,
स्वामी दुःख बिनसे मन का ।
सुख सम्पति घर आवे,
सुख सम्पति घर आवे,
कष्ट मिटे तन का ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

मात पिता तुम मेरे,
शरण गहूं किसकी,
स्वामी शरण गहूं मैं किसकी ।
तुम बिन और न दूजा,
तुम बिन और न दूजा,
आस करूं मैं जिसकी ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम पूरण परमात्मा,
तुम अन्तर्यामी,
स्वामी तुम अन्तर्यामी ।
पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर,
पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर,
तुम सब के स्वामी ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम करुणा के सागर,
तुम पालनकर्ता,
स्वामी तुम पालनकर्ता ।
मैं मूरख फलकामी,
मैं सेवक तुम स्वामी,
कृपा करो भर्ता॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम हो एक अगोचर,
सबके प्राणपति,
स्वामी सबके प्राणपति ।
किस विधि मिलूं दयामय,
किस विधि मिलूं दयामय,
तुमको मैं कुमति ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

दीन-बन्धु दुःख-हर्ता,
ठाकुर तुम मेरे,
स्वामी रक्षक तुम मेरे ।
अपने हाथ उठाओ,
अपने शरण लगाओ,
द्वार पड़ा तेरे ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

Om Jai Jagdish Hare,
Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
The troubles of the devotees,
the troubles of the enslaved people,
Remove it in a moment.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Those who meditate will get results,
A mind without sorrow,
Lord of sorrow without mind.
May happiness and wealth come home,
May happiness and wealth come home,
The pain of the body is gone.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are my mother and father,
Whose refuge is wheat?
Lord, whose refuge should I seek?
Without you and no one else,
Without you and no one else,
What should I hope for?
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are the perfect God,
you are the intrepid one,
Swami, you are the inner one.
Supreme God,
Supreme God,
Lord of all of you.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are an ocean of compassion,
You are the nurturer,
Master, you are the nurturer.
I am a fruitless fool,
I am a servant and you are a master.
Please fill me.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are an invisible one,
Lord of all,
Lord and creator of all.
In what way can I find mercy?
In what way can I find mercy?
To you I am Kumti.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Dear friend, remover of sorrow,
Thakur you are mine,
Lord, you are my protector.
raise your hands,
take shelter,
The door is yours.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

om jay jagadeesh hare, svaamee jay jagadeesh hare . bhakt janon ke sankat, daas janon ke sankat, kshan mein door kare . . om jay jagadeesh hare... jo dhyaave phal paave, duhkh binase man ka, svaamee duhkh binase man ka . sukh sampati ghar aave, sukh sampati ghar aave, kasht mite tan ka . . om jay jagadeesh hare... maat pita tum mere, sharan gahoon kisakee, svaamee sharan gahoon main kisakee . tum bin aur na dooja, tum bin aur na dooja, aas karoon main jisakee . . om jay jagadeesh hare... tum pooran paramaatma, tum antaryaamee, svaamee tum antaryaamee . paarabrahm parameshvar, paarabrahm parameshvar, tum sab ke svaamee . . om jay jagadeesh hare... tum karuna ke saagar, tum paalanakarta, svaamee tum paalanakarta . main moorakh phalakaamee, main sevak tum svaamee, krpa karo bharta. . om jay jagadeesh hare... tum ho ek agochar, sabake praanapati, svaamee sabake praanapati . kis vidhi miloon dayaamay, kis vidhi miloon dayaamay, tumako main kumati . . om jay jagadeesh hare... deen-bandhu duhkh-harta, thaakur tum mere, svaamee rakshak tum mere . apane haath uthao, apane sharan lagao, dvaar pada tere . . om jay jagadeesh hare...

शरण गहूं किसकी,
स्वामी शरण गहूं मैं किसकी ।
तुम बिन और न दूजा,
तुम बिन और न दूजा,
आस करूं मैं जिसकी ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम पूरण परमात्मा,
तुम अन्तर्यामी,
स्वामी तुम अन्तर्यामी ।
पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर,
पारब्रह्म परमेश्वर,
तुम सब के स्वामी ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम करुणा के सागर,
तुम पालनकर्ता,
स्वामी तुम पालनकर्ता ।
मैं मूरख फलकामी,
मैं सेवक तुम स्वामी,
कृपा करो भर्ता॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

तुम हो एक अगोचर,
सबके प्राणपति,
स्वामी सबके प्राणपति ।
किस विधि मिलूं दयामय,
किस विधि मिलूं दयामय,
तुमको मैं कुमति ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

दीन-बन्धु दुःख-हर्ता,
ठाकुर तुम मेरे,
स्वामी रक्षक तुम मेरे ।
अपने हाथ उठाओ,
अपने शरण लगाओ,
द्वार पड़ा तेरे ॥
॥ ॐ जय जगदीश हरे..॥

Om Jai Jagdish Hare,
Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
The troubles of the devotees,
the troubles of the enslaved people,
Remove it in a moment.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Those who meditate will get results,
A mind without sorrow,
Lord of sorrow without mind.
May happiness and wealth come home,
May happiness and wealth come home,
The pain of the body is gone.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are my mother and father,
Whose refuge is wheat?
Lord, whose refuge should I seek?
Without you and no one else,
Without you and no one else,
What should I hope for?
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are the perfect God,
you are the intrepid one,
Swami, you are the inner one.
Supreme God,
Supreme God,
Lord of all of you.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are an ocean of compassion,
You are the nurturer,
Master, you are the nurturer.
I am a fruitless fool,
I am a servant and you are a master.
Please fill me.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

You are an invisible one,
Lord of all,
Lord and creator of all.
In what way can I find mercy?
In what way can I find mercy?
To you I am Kumti.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Dear friend, remover of sorrow,
Thakur you are mine,
Lord, you are my protector.
raise your hands,
take shelter,
The door is yours.
, Om Jai Jagdish Hare..॥

Lyrics :-
Rabb maan liya tujhko 
Jagg maan liya tujhko 
Tu he hai dunia meri 
Sabb maan liya tujhko,,

Maanga  jo paaya vahi  ,,

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

Bachkay ray bachkay deewane,,
Tu naino kay khel na jaane ,,


Tu meri jaan hai yaara ,,
Tu he hai jaan say pyara ,,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara
Dhadkan banke rehna yaara ,,
Apna mujhey kehna yaara ,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara ,

Tujhey yaar kahay
Jisay pyaar kahay 
Humey toh hogea hai vahi , 

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea ,,
khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

#teredilmein #elvishyadav #elvish #jannat #jannatzubair #ritoriba

snippet.title: Live Dohori Nepali |"जाम भने जान्छौ र माया" Jam Bhane Janchhau Ra Maya - Chij Gurung, Rejina Pariyar
snippet.description:
Presenting the authentic Nepali Live Dohori song "Jam Bhane Janchhau Ra Maya" By Chij Gurung & Rejina Pariyar, brought to you by Music Nepal.

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats. Enjoy the real taste of Nepali folk, Dohori, and regional music heritage.
Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music Nepal’s timeless Lok Geet collection.

लाईभ दोहोरी नेपाली लोकसंगीतका सबैभन्दा जीवन्त र अन्तरक्रियात्मक स्वरूपहरूमध्ये एक हो, जसलाई वास्तविक समयमा प्रस्तुत गरिन्छ र दर्शकहरूले पनि प्रायः सहभागिता जनाउँछन्। यो केवल संगीत प्रस्तुति मात्र होइन—यो सांस्कृतिक संवाद हो, जसले बुद्धि, ताल, र कथावाचनलाई मिसाउँछ।

🎶 Original Audio Credits:- 

🎬Video Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9XYp1Igek18

snippet.title: Mera Haq Kaha Hai | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | Aarzoo Khaan | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Mera Haq Kaha Hai | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | Aarzoo Khaan | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe



Kabhi jo apna tha,
aaj us par
sawaal bhi adhura reh jaata hai.

“Mera Haq Kaha Hai”
ek aise rishte ki kahani hai
jahan mohabbat thi,
par us par haq
kahin kho gaya.

Is gaane mein
gussa nahi,
shikayat nahi,
bas ek khamosh sawal hai
jo dil roz poochhta hai —
jo kabhi mera tha,
aaj uspe mera haq kaha hai?

Agar aapne bhi
kisi apne ko
dheere-dheere
paraya hote dekha hai,
to ye gaana
aapke ehsaas ko
awaaz dega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Bipul Chettri - Lopchu ko Orali (Official Visualiser)
snippet.description:
Lopchu, a small village in the Darjeeling hills, apart from its famous tea gardens is familiar to us as a spot to stop and relax for a bit while we journey on to various other places and journeys in life. So, even if it is for this brief moment, we give pause amongst mist, slow mornings, deep green slopes, and that calm, slightly melancholic beauty you only get in such mountain places. It carries a sense of stillness and depth, like something that doesn’t rush to explain itself. It belongs to memory.

Now streaming on all platforms.

MUSIC
Bipul Chettri - Vocals, Electric Guitar, Acoustic Guitar, Backing Vocals
Rahul Rai - Bass
Shantanu Sudarshan - Drums, Percussions
Prince Nepali - Sarangi, Tungna, Madal
Anindo Bose - Organ
Blue Notes School of Music Ensemble - Backing Vocals

Recorded by Jonty Indra, Anindo Bose & Binaya Man Amatya
Mixed & Mastered by Binaya Man Amatya

Lyrics, Composition & Arrangement - Bipul Chettri
Producer - Bipul Chettri
Executive Producer - Sonam Tashi

A Video by Gundruk

Shot by Pemba Tshering Tamang & Akash Pradhan

In Appearance
Sujit Subba, Palzer Lama, Passang Lamu Sherpa, Pratibha Subba, Aryan Rai, Jorden Sherpa, Nehal Pradhan

Drone video by Abhishek Painkra (abi_isiwaqt)
Trip managed by Trail Begins

We would like to extend our very special thanks to:
The Mukhian Homestay, Lopchu, Anmol Mukhia, Aaku Pema Dukpa & the amazing people of Lopchu.

All Rights Reserved by Bipul Chettri. 2026.

snippet.title: I Went Broke for This Full UTOTY Team... Was It Worth It?
snippet.description:
I officially went BROKE to build the most expensive team in FC Mobile history! Today, we assemble the FULL Ultimate Team of the Year (UTOTY) Squad.

In this video, I drained my account to zero to afford the perfect UTOTY  team. I went all-in on FC Points and Gems to pack the rarest cards in the game: UTOTY Mbappe, UTOTY Haaland, UTOTY Van Dijk, & more.

It was a rollercoaster of emotions from packing huge walkouts to struggling with the market. Now that I have the squad, was it worth going broke? Watch the gameplay to find out!

🔥 VIDEO HIGHLIGHTS:

The Challenge: Building the Full UTOTY XI (No matter the cost)
The Spending: Draining the Bank Account 💸
The Pulls: UTOTY Haaland, Saliba & Nuno Mendes! ⚡
The Struggle: Hunting for the final pieces (Kounde & Donnarumma)
The Gameplay: Is a 124 OVR UTOTY Squad worth going broke for? 🎮

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star the Cloud Contest Challenge (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star the Cloud Contest Challenge in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attack which showcases the Stick Horse Equipment from the upcoming Medal Event. This is a controllable hero challenge using the Barbarian King but I have practiced to assure this method is reliable for you. Best of luck with your 3 stars though and thank you for supporting the channel with Code Judo!

es.title: Fácilmente 3 Estrellas en el Desafío Competición En Las Nubes (Clash of Clans)
es.description:
Cómo conseguir 3 estrellas en el desafío Competición En Las Nubes en Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth ofrece un tutorial para el nuevo ataque de evento que muestra el equipamiento de Galopalo del próximo Evento de Medalla. Este desafío de héroe se puede controlar con el Rey Bárbaro, pero he practicado para asegurarme de que este método sea fiable. ¡Mucha suerte con tus 3 estrellas y gracias por apoyar el canal con Código Judo!

Video Sugerido:
Superando todos los mapas de duendes SIN tropas: https://youtu.be/2jAkp-m6CN

Gracias por usar el código 'Judo' en Clash of Clans para apoyarme.

En Clash of Clans: https://bit.ly/CodeJudo

en.description:
🔥 Franklin Found Longest Road To Colorful Spider-Man Head – Indian Bike Driving 3D 🔥

In this video, you will see an insane adventure where Franklin discovers the longest road leading straight to a giant colorful Spider-Man head 😱🕷
This mod brings crazy visuals, thrill rides, and unexpected moments inside Indian Bike Driving 3D.

Enjoy high-speed bike rides, dangerous roads, colorful locations, and full entertainment till the end 🔥

👉 Video Highlights:

• Franklin Finds the Longest Road 🛣
• Colorful Spider-Man Head Mod 🕷🌈

snippet.description:
TOP 6 MOST POWERFUL MANTRAS TO IMPROVE YOUR LIFE | आपके दिन की सही शुरुआत करने के 6 मंत्र
TOP 6 MOST POWERFUL MANTRAS TO IMPROVE YOUR LIFE | आपके दिन की सही शुरुआत करने के 6 मंत्र

अपने जीवन में सकारात्मक ऊर्जा, शांति, सफलता और आत्मबल लाने के लिए

 शिव मंत्र
 गणेश मंत्र
 देवी शक्ति मंत्र

 शांति व सफलता के लिए मंत्र

 नकारात्मकता दूर होती है

snippet.title: तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Pratibha Sinha
snippet.description:
सुनिए आशा भोसले और कुमार सानू की आवाज़ में डूबा हुआ, 90 के दशक का ये खूबसूरत नगमा - 'तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा'! यह गाना 'कल की आवाज़' फिल्म से है, और यह प्यार और रोमांस की गहराईयों को छूता है। 90 के दशक के संगीत का जादू आज भी बरकरार है, और इस गाने में वो जादू साफ़ झलकता है। आशा भोसले और कुमार सानू ने अपनी आवाज़ से इस गाने को अमर बना दिया है। उनकी गायकी में एक अनोखी कशिश है, जो सीधे दिल को छू जाती है। अगर आप 90 के दशक के रोमांटिक गानों के दीवाने हैं, तो यह गाना आपके लिए ही है।



Credits :

Song: Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 


अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो कृपया लाइक करें, कमेंट करके अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on…

#TumhariNazronMein #AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #90sHindiSongs #RomanticSongs #HindiLoveSongs #KalKiAwaz #BollywoodClassics #OldHindiSongs #90sMusic


#TumhariNazronMeinHumneDekha #KalKiAwaz #AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #90sHindiSongs #90sBollywood #RomanticHindiSongs #LoveSongs #HindiLoveSongs #ClassicBollywoodSongs #OldHindiSongs #NostalgicSongs #Melody #IndianMusic #BollywoodMusic      #90

snippet.title: Minecraft Trapper VS 1000 Players
snippet.description:
On the world's largest Hardcore Minecraft server, I challenged 1000 players to try to ban me off the Unstable SMP. This is my story of how I fought back as a Minecraft Trapper...

Minecraft Trapper VS 1000 Players

inspired by @JudeLoSasso's MrBeast 1000 players video!

Unstable SMP Members
➜ @wemmbumc 
➜ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ @ParrotX2 
➜ @Spokeishere 




possible spoilers below this point

trap designs:
Arrow Railgun: @Glue_IsSticky @croak14 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BfW9ZasLQBs
8x8 Piston Fall Trap: @ShadowKiller_NM https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=okdsyn196sA
Landmines: @Ro11enYT https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UxJj766xgCI
Invisible Chest Void Trap: @jojosolos https://www.youtube.com/shorts/lsF_juE6UOI
TNT Railgun: @justwhitevoid https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9ISAqBQ5ejw

features: @MapiccMc @PrinceZam @Leowook + a surprise guest....

music: 
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

written, recorded, & edited by spoke
